channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rappler+ Town Hall Highlights Investigation into Chinese Espionage in the Philippines
item.description: Rappler recently held its first Rappler+ members’ town hall titled 'Out of the Echo Chambers' on March 27 at the Rappler Civic Hub. The main highlight was the investigative report by Bea Cupin on a Ch...

item.title: Tanzania Enhances Emergency Medical Training to Improve National Crisis Response
item.description: Tanzania inajitahidi kuwa tayari zaidi kwa dharura za afya na majanga yanayohusiana na mabadiliko ya tabianchi kupitia mpango wa kitaifa wa mafunzo ya Timu za Dharura za Matibabu (EMTs). Mpango huu, u...

item.title: Leoht Cafe: A Light-Filled Spot for Breakfast and Lunch in Battery Point
item.description: Nestled among the historic homes of Battery Point, Leoht Cafe offers a warm, light-filled space with stunning misty mountain views from its front terrace. This charming cafe serves a globetrotting all...

item.title: Donald Trump Faces Challenges Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: The Full Story podcast explores the impact of the ongoing conflict with Iran on former U.S. President Donald Trump. David Smith speaks with Reged Ahmad about how Trump's attempts to assert control ove...

item.title: Government Considers Loans to Support Bayanihan 3 Amid Rising Fuel Prices
item.description: House Ways and Means Committee chairman Rep. Miro Quimbo stated that borrowing remains an option for the government to fund the proposed Bayanihan 3 program, which seeks to provide aid packages to Fil...

item.title: Pakistan and Afghanistan hold exploratory talks in China over security concerns
item.description: Officials from Pakistan, Afghanistan, and China convened in Urumqi, China, under the trilateral mechanism to discuss regional security issues. This meeting comes after Pakistan launched Operation Ghaz...

item.title: Donald Trump Sculpture Added as Fifth Face on Mount Rushmore
item.description: In a highly controversial development, Mount Rushmore in South Dakota, a monument traditionally commemorating the nation's most revered presidents, is having a fifth face added, that of Donald J. Trum...

item.title: Overview of Fuel Surcharges Across Canadian Consumer Services Amid Rising Oil Prices
item.description: As crude oil prices remain above the US$100 mark due to ongoing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, various consumer-facing sectors in Canada are adjusting their pricing to offset rising fuel co...

item.title: China Commends Pakistan’s Diplomatic Role in Middle East Peace Initiative
item.description: During a recent visit to Beijing, Pakistan’s Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar met with Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi, where both sides discussed regional developments in West As...

item.title: Carpio Warns of Risks if Philippines Agrees to China’s Oil and Gas Terms
item.description: Former Supreme Court Senior Associate Justice Antonio Carpio has warned that the Philippines would be putting itself in a very dangerous position if it agrees to the terms proposed by China in ongoing...

item.title: Experiencing Meta’s smartglasses: convenience, privacy concerns and social discomfort
item.description: Over the course of a month, the author tested Meta’s smartglasses, featuring an AI assistant voiced by Judi Dench. While the glasses offer functions like taking photos, making calls, giving directions...

item.title: Army recovers abandoned NPA firearms with help of local villagers in Surigao del Sur
item.description: Soldiers of the Philippine Army successfully recovered several firearms abandoned by New People's Army (NPA) guerrillas in Surigao del Sur through coordinated operations aided by vigilant local villag...

item.title: Tanzania Strengthens National Strategy Against Drug-Resistant Pathogens
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Tanzania government imeanza kufanya jitihada kubwa kuzuia pathogens zinazopinga dawa (DR-TDs). Katika kikao cha 32 cha National Coordination Committee on DR-TDs, ambacho kimehusisha wi...

item.title: Different Prayers on Duterte’s Anniversary Highlight Deep Divisions in Philippine Society
item.description: On March 11, the first anniversary of Rodrigo Duterte’s arrest for crimes against humanity, two very different Masses were held in separate cities reflecting contrasting perspectives on his legacy. In...

item.title: Pakistan Stock Exchange KSE-100 index rises sharply amid market recovery
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) witnessed a remarkable surge on Wednesday as the KSE-100 index climbed by 7,461.58 points, or 5.02%, reaching 156,204.89 from the previous close of 148,743.31. This s...

item.title: Tanzania strengthens emergency response through national medical team training
item.description: Tanzania dey take strong steps to prepare for health emergencies like pandemics, floods, and other disasters. The government, together with WHO and other partners under the Pandemic Fund, don launch n...

item.title: PNP Introduces Over 5,000 New Equipment and Vehicles to Strengthen Operations
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) recently showcased over 5,000 new pieces of equipment and vehicles aimed at improving police visibility and operational efficiency nationwide. The blessing ceremon...

item.title: Nigeria’s Transport Minister Alkali Steps Down to Contest Gombe Governorship in 2027
item.description: Nigeria’s Minister of Transportation, Saidu Ahmed Alkali, don officially resign from him position to fit pursue Gombe State governorship seat ahead of 2027 general elections. This move follow Presiden...

item.title: Vicky Pattison discusses career pressures and fertility struggles
item.description: Vicky Pattison, widely recognised from Strictly Come Dancing and Geordie Shore, has opened up about the intense pressures she faced within the television industry. Balancing multiple commitments, incl...

item.title: Anthropic discloses internal AI coding files by mistake
item.description: Anthropic, the AI company behind Claude Code, accidentally released part of its internal source code due to human error, the company clarified on Tuesday. The mishap involved an internal-use file that...
